mapper.select: /* PoB2bDaysObQtyMapper.xml selectErpPoB2bDaysObQtyList */ SELECT TRN_ID , WBLNO , CTKEY , IBEXPCTDAY , ACKEY , PONO , POSEQ , POROW , ICKEY , POQTY , IBEXPCTQTY FROM TORDER_EAI_POORDER_BATCH WHERE SND_PROC_TYP IN ('N','E','R') AND SND_DATE BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY TRN_ID
